_comment: Guest-readiness suite: pipeline-skill dogfoods its sibling baseline-skill to prove the repo is ready for any expected guest. project_type=docs narrows the run to the rules that fit a zero-dep docs/distribution repo (build/test/service rules skip as n/a). Scored via: node ../baseline/baseline-skill/check.mjs --repo .

sources_of_truth.check.mjs: The checker — single source of truth for how a rule is scored (loads its rule set from its own directory).
sources_of_truth.rules.json: The rule-set manifest; the 39 rules live in rules/ (canonical, machine-readable), one file per family.
sources_of_truth.REFERENCE.md: Full human reference: data flow, config keys, CI wiring, and the ledger format.
sources_of_truth.SKILL.md: How the /pipeline agent skill behaves (score / init / fix / explain modes).
sources_of_truth.GLOSSARY.md: Plain-language definitions of the delivery/DevOps terms the rules use.
sources_of_truth.docs/spec/SPEC.md: The locked v0.1 spec of record — the taxonomy, profiles, and acceptance criteria.
